brand_dna: Mr. Tree (มิสเตอร์ทรี) is a health and wellness product brand targeting adults 40+ who value simplicity and clarity. The brand emphasizes clean, modern design with a light and airy aesthetic that feels contemporary and easy to navigate. The founder wants a minimalist approach with bright, soft tones that conveys trustworthiness and accessibility — no clutter, straightforward product presentation, and clear messaging for this mature demographic.
